introSection: Noisette Express (English: Hazelnut Express) is a steel roller coaster located at Nigloland in Dolancourt, Grand Est, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
When Nigloland reopened for its 2019 season, land had been cleared near Chenille. On the construction fences signs teased a new for 2020 attraction.

On 8 July 2019, a preview center was installed in the park. It revealed the name of the ride, as well as the layout and some theming elements.

While the ride does not sit on the plot of land previously occupied by Chenille, it succeeds it as the park's Kiddie Coaster.

Noisette Express opened on 11 July 2020.

fullText:
Noisette Express (English: Hazelnut Express) is a steel roller coaster located at Nigloland in Dolancourt, Grand Est, France.

When Nigloland reopened for its 2019 season, land had been cleared near Chenille. On the construction fences signs teased a new for 2020 attraction.

On 8 July 2019, a preview center was installed in the park. It revealed the name of the ride, as well as the layout and some theming elements.

While the ride does not sit on the plot of land previously occupied by Chenille, it succeeds it as the park's Kiddie Coaster.

Noisette Express opened on 11 July 2020.
